title: Section 13
content: Subject to the control of the Superintendent, the Medical Officer shall have charge of the sanitary administration of the prison, and shall perform such 1duties as may be prescribed by rules made by the State Government under section 2[59].
footnote: 1. For rules as to Medical Officer's duties under s. 13, see different local Rules and Orders. 2. Subs. by the A O. 1937, for "60".
